title: Bare Bones x Immersive Aircraft
description: Bare Bones textures for Immersive Aircraft mod ! 🛩️
body:
![Bare Bones x Immersive Aircraft logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f58376f1a76e07cd4972aa9b9fdd94ff1a5737f2.png)
-----------

This resource pack adds Bare Bones textures to [Immersive Aircraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft) !

- I highly recommend using [Bare Bones x Mods](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-mods) instead of this pack - It's a more convenient way to use my Bare Bones compatibility packs !
